items.html: However, the Gevurot of BON of MA that are in Aba are placed in the NHY [Netzah-Hod-Yesod] of Ima, and they became Hasadim relative to the Gevura of Ima — which, as is known, are also Gevurot of BON, of the BON of her portion. And the Hasadim of MA from the MA of Aba, together with the Hasadim of MA of BON of Ima, are placed in the NHY of Aba; and the Hasadim of Ima became Gevurot relative to the Hasadim of Aba, as is known. And all of this first enters, in its entirety, into ZA [Zeir Anpin].
